userStories.story: As a student, I want to send a message to the AI tutor so that I can get help with my studies
criteria: Given I am on the chat page
When I type a question and click send
Then I receive a response from the AI tutor

userStories.story: As a student, I want to ask questions about the current lesson so that I can get contextual help
criteria: Given I am on a lesson page with the chat panel open
When I ask a question about the lesson content
Then I receive a relevant response

userStories.story: As a student, I want to see feedback when sending an empty message so that I understand the system expects input
criteria: Given I am on the chat page
When I click send without typing a message
Then I see an error message or the send button is disabled
